description: Neither a schedule nor its daypart declares an explicit misfire, so each defaults to catch_up_once and a relay resuming after an offline gap re-resolves the currently-holding daypart immediately; a rules/1 preset_batch action fired from a one-shot time trigger with no misfire declaration of its own is a distinct path that keeps rules/1's own skip default, entirely unchanged by this contract.

gap_events.note: the 08:00:00 transition into the daytime daypart was missed while offline

unrelated_rules_1_context.note: a separate automation rule, not a row this contract defines, referenced here only for contrast

daypart_state_at_relay_resume.reason: catch_up_once: current state re-resolved fresh, not queued

expected.reason: the schedule/daypart default (catch_up_once) is this contract's own; the rules/1 time trigger's default (skip) is rules/1 RUL-354's, unchanged
